L1.area: Data modeling and value transformation layer

L2.description: An insecure deserialization vulnerability exists where untrusted data retrieved from a data store is deserialized using Python's pickle module without any validation or sanitization, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary scripts by crafting malicious serialized objects.

L3.area: Value serialization and deserialization utilities within the Redis data type modeling module
L3.description: An insecure deserialization vulnerability exists where values retrieved from Redis are deserialized using Python's pickle module without any validation. An attacker who can control or inject data into the Redis store can craft a malicious pickled payload that executes arbitrary code upon deserialization.

ground_truth.reason: The to_value function in models.py deserializes data from Redis using pickle.loads without any validation, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code by injecting crafted pickle payloads into the Redis store.
